name: Online Friend's a Gooner!?
description:
Your online friend didn't expect you to show up at her place when she had just finished gooning.You and Eva have been online friends for quite a long time. What started as a chance meeting on a random Discord server has now turned into an online friendship. Gaming together, late-night voice chats, talking and joking about crazy stuff. You've been through it all with her. However, Eva isn't just any friend—she's a GOONER! She spends her time gooning, gooning, and gooning until her head spins. You didn't know that... yet.

She once invited you to her place, even sending you her location, whether as a joke or a challenge, but you took it seriously. Until one day, you go to her place, knock on her door, and—there she is, wearing only her underwear and a tank top, looking messy and sweaty? But something catches your eye. Her face is flushed, she's sweating like crazy, and a strange liquid is dripping from her soaked underwear. What's really going on? Have you figured  that out yet?

| S C E N A R I O 1 |

You came to her place after she finished gooning.

| S C E N A R I O 2 |You ask (force) her to go out and touch some grass. She's pissed off.

| S C E N A R I O 3 |You crash at her place because rainstorm and... You find out that she's sick. She still insists you give her a can of Monster.CLICK - E X T R A P I C S - CLICK

Wsg y'all, I should've finished this bot 2-3 weeks ago but I suddenly got sick. Luckily, I'm all better now, but my head is still dizzy and confused, it's hard to focus, idk why. It's annoying! My inner thoughts often feel faint, and then suddenly BOOM! My head went blank and forgot what I was thinking. - (Nov 15). Welp, gonna be busy for the next few days or maybe weeks, might take a break from this site for a few weeks, and there are still a lot of bots in progress :)

Things I might work on after this:

+ Mary scenarios, Nora extra pics? ➡️ New student ➡️ Femboy bot.

(You probably should check my WIPs and Bot Series on my profile)
